chunks.title: Glory to God and Idols
chunks.reason: A prayer declaring God's glory contrasted with the lifeless nature of idols.

chunks.title: Call to Trust
chunks.reason: A threefold invitation for Israel, Aaron, and the faithful to trust in Yahweh.

chunks.title: Divine Blessings
chunks.reason: A declaration of God's remembrance and a prayer for increase and blessing.

chunks.title: Praise from the Living
chunks.reason: A concluding contrast between the dead who do not praise and the living who will.
